description_long: This chaise features a modern, boxy silhouette with a single right-side armrest and a low, rectangular backrest. The upholstery is a smooth, solid blue fabric, giving it a contemporary and understated appearance. A single, loose rectangular cushion is placed against the backrest, providing additional comfort and support. The seat is wide and deep, designed for lounging, with ample space for one person to recline. The base is solid and fully upholstered, with no visible legs, contributing to a grounded and monolithic look. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or patterns.
description: A modern blue chaise with a right-side armrest, low backrest, and a single loose cushion, featuring a minimalist, fully upholstered design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, low backrest, right-side armrest, and the loose cushion against the backrest.
description_view_1: Right side view highlights the depth of the seat, the thickness of the backrest, and the single armrest on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid, fully upholstered back and the continuous base with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Left side view reveals the absence of an armrest on the left and the profile of the backrest and cushion.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is low, rectangular, and fully upholstered, with a smooth surface and no visible segmentation or decorative elements. It provides a simple, supportive structure for reclining.
attribute_armrest_presence: There is a single armrest on the right side, which is rectangular and fully upholstered, matching the backrest in height and style.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the base is fully upholstered and extends to the floor, giving the chaise a solid, block-like appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is one loose, rectangular cushion placed against the backrest, providing additional comfort. The seat itself is a single, wide, attached cushion.
